issues.description: GiveDon action is incorrect. Card text states 'Add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it' — this requires SearchDeck (to add from deck) + AttachDon (to attach/rest it), not GiveDon (which generates DON!!). GiveDon should only be used for generating new DON!!.

Condition should use 'HasAttachedDon' with count:3 to represent 'rest 3 of your DON!! cards', but the trigger context needs clarification: this is an [Activate: Main] ability that consumes 3 DON!! as a cost, not a conditional effect. Consider if cost mechanic is properly represented.
PlayFromHand action is correct for playing the Character, but verify filter syntax matches official DSL schema for {ODYSSEY} subType specification.
